author: DominicVainMod
content:
Team Break,Hey everyone!

The Star Atlas team will be on break starting now until January 5. During this time, responses from team members will be much slower, if not non-existent. 

Thank you so much to everyone who chooses to support Star Atlas every day. Your support continues to mean the world to everyone on the team. We’re excited to come back refreshed and ready to deliver an incredible 2026.

Happy Holidays, and we’ll see you in the new year!  

@everyone
